claim: Verification confirms that no assumption is presented as fact. Both explorer and cross-checker independently verified project facts from actual source files and tests. All evidence paths are valid and point to existing project files. No unresolved missing data remains; the blocking behavior is well-documented in code and tests.

evidence.summary: Explorer and cross-checker both verified evidenceResultBlockingIssues creates blockers for missing, clarify, block, and failed statuses
evidence.why: Two independent agent reads confirm the same function implements blocking logic

evidence.summary: Both agents verified inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues and adds issues to blockers
evidence.why: Cross-validated integration between evidence blocking and readiness inspection

evidence.summary: Both agents verified prd_ready equals blockers.length === 0, ensuring any blocker prevents PRD generation
evidence.why: Final gate cross-verified by independent reads

evidence.summary: Both agents verified test confirms blocking behavior for missing evidence and clarify recommendations
evidence.why: Test coverage independently verified by both agents

evidence.summary: Both agents verified evidence-dispatch calls inspectDemandPrdReadiness and enforces prd_ready false when blockers exist
evidence.why: Integration cross-verified by independent agent reads

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker independently verified all claims from actual project source files and tests. No assumptions were presented as facts. All evidence paths are valid and exist in the project. No missing data remains unresolved. The demand confirms existing working behavior: evidence agents reporting missing, clarify, block, or failed statuses correctly block PRD readiness.
